# Phase 2.1 procedural map generation requirements (2026-02-28 09:59Z)

_**User**_

Check if Phase 2.1 Procedural Map Generation requirements are met:

Requirements:
- [x] Use ROT.Map.Digger for interior ruins (hallways, rooms)
- [x] Generate a 50x50 tile map as a 2D number array
- [x] Transform rot.js output into Phaser tilemap-compatible data
- [x] Add a decoration pass (vegetation/vines, rubble/debris)
- [x] Implement room identification with names ("library wing", "reading room", etc.)

Check src/game/systems/MapGenerator.ts and related files.

          {
            "text": "/**",

          },
          {
            "text": " * Generate a procedural ruin map using ROT.Map.Digger.",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": " * Returns ground, walls, decoration layers + room metadata.",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "export function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const ground: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  const walls: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  const decoration: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.EMPTY));",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  const digger = new ROTMap.Digger(",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    MAP_WIDTH,",

          },
          {
            "text": "    MAP_HEIGHT,",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomWidth: [5, 12],",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomHeight: [4, 8],",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "      corridorLength: [2, 8],",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "      dugPercentage: 0.25,",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rawMap: number[][] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    rawMap[x] = new Array(MAP_HEIGHT).fill(1);",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "  digger.create((x: number, y: number, value: number) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (x &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT) {",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "      rawMap[x][y] = value;",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rooms = digger.getRooms() as Array&lt;{ _x1: number; _y1: number; _x2: number; _y2: number }&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "  const shuffledNames = [...ROOM_NAMES].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "  const taggedRooms: GeneratedRoom[] = rooms.map((room, i) =&gt; {",

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "    return {",

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 103

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let i = 0; i &lt; rubbleCount; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { x, y } = shuffledCorridors[i];",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[y][x] = TILE.RUBBLE;",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Flooded tiles: passable but slow, visually distinct (blue-gray overlay)",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "  const floorTiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; decoration[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY) {",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "        floorTiles.push({ x, y });",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "  const floodCount = Math.min(3 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 5), floorTiles.length);",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "  const shuffledFloors = [...floorTiles].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let i = 0; i &lt; floodCount; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { x, y } = shuffledFloors[i];",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration[y][x] = TILE.FLOODED;",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "    floodedTiles.add(&#96;${x},${y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "  let spawnX = Math.floor(MAP_WIDTH / 2);",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "  let spawnY = Math.floor(MAP_HEIGHT / 2);",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "  const spawnRoom = taggedRooms[0];",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (spawnRoom &amp;&amp; walls[spawnRoom.centerY]?.[spawnRoom.centerX] === TILE.EMPTY) {",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX = spawnRoom.centerX;",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY = spawnRoom.centerY;",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "  } else if (spawnRoom) {",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let dy = -1; dy &lt;= 1; dy++) {",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "      for (let dx = -1; dx &lt;= 1; dx++) {",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "        const tx = spawnRoom.centerX + dx;",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "        const ty = spawnRoom.centerY + dy;",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (walls[ty]?.[tx] === TILE.EMPTY) {",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "          spawnX = tx;",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "          spawnY = ty;",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "          break;",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "  // BFS from spawn to get reachable tiles (after rubble) — items only placed here",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "  const reachableTiles = computeReachableTiles(walls, spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "  return {",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "    ground,",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls,",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration,",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: taggedRooms,",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX,",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY,",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "    floodedTiles,",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "    reachableTiles,",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 221,

            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 223

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "      const raw = rawMap[x][y];",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "      const isOpen = raw === 0 || raw === 2;",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (isOpen) {",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "        const inRoom = taggedRooms.some(",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "          (r) =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "        );",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] =",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "          FLOOR_TILES[Math.floor(Math.random() * FLOOR_TILES.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (inRoom) {",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "          ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] =",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "          WALL_TILES[Math.floor(Math.random() * WALL_TILES.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 1; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT - 1; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 1; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH - 1; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "      const adjacentToWall = [",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x - 1, y],",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x + 1, y],",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x, y - 1],",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x, y + 1],",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "      ].some(([nx, ny]) =&gt; walls[ny]?.[nx] &amp;&amp; walls[ny][nx] !== TILE.EMPTY);",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (adjacentToWall &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.25) {",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = TILE.DEBRIS;",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "        !adjacentToWall &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] === TILE.STONE_FLOOR &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "        Math.random() &lt; 0.03",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "      ) {",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = TILE.VINE;",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Corridor rubble: block some corridor tiles (distinct dark tiles, impassable)",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "  const floodedTiles = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "  const inRoom = (x: number, y: number) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "    taggedRooms.some((r) =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2);",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "  const corridorTiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 1; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT - 1; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 1; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH - 1; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!inRoom(x, y)) corridorTiles.push({ x, y });",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rubbleCount = Math.min(5 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 8), corridorTiles.length);",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "  const shuffledCorridors = [...corridorTiles].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let i = 0; i &lt; rubbleCount; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { x, y } = shuffledCorridors[i];",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 171
          },

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create HUD.tsx:",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shows current area name",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shows fragment count (e.g., \"📚 3/47 fragments recovered\")",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Positioned as a non-intrusive bar at top of screen",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Semantic HTML: &#96;&lt;header role=\"banner\"&gt;&#96; with proper heading",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create AccessibleLog.tsx:",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "  - An &#96;aria-live=\"polite\"&#96; region that receives text descriptions of game events",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"You entered the Ruined Library of Congress\"",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"You found a book fragment nearby\"",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"You picked up Canto I of Dante's Inferno\"",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Visually hidden (CSS) but available to screen readers",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "  - This is the accessibility groundwork — every important game event gets a text log entry",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create DialogueBox.tsx (basic version):",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Renders dialogue text in a styled box at bottom of screen",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Advance with Space/Enter, close when dialogue ends",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Semantic HTML with &#96;role=\"dialog\"&#96; and &#96;aria-modal=\"true\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.7 — Phase 1 Milestone ✅",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "**✅ Done when**: You can move a character on a tile-based map, bump into walls,",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "face an object and see an interaction prompt, and see a basic HUD overlay.",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "The accessible event log quietly captures movement and interaction events.",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "## Phase 2: Core Game Loop (Proof of Concept)",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.1 — Procedural Map Generation",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create MapGenerator.ts using rot.js:",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Use &#96;ROT.Map.Digger&#96; for interior ruins (hallways, rooms)",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "  - (ROT.Map.Cellular for overgrown outdoor — deferred; Digger + decoration suffices)",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Generate a 50x50 tile map as a 2D number array",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Transform the rot.js output into Phaser tilemap-compatible data:",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    - 0 (open) → random floor/ground tile indices",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    - 1 (wall) → random wall/rubble tile indices",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Apply variety: multiple tile indices per type for visual interest",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Create the tilemap dynamically in Phaser using &#96;this.make.tilemap({ data, tileWidth: 32, tileHeight: 32 })&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Add a decoration pass:",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Scatter vegetation (vines) on floor tiles (low probability)",
            "lineNumber": 209
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3674449920654297

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/mapUtils.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 7,
            "column": 34
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 84,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " * Create a static test tilemap for Phase 1.3.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " * Ground layer, wall/collision layer, decoration layer.",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "export function createStaticTestMap(): {",
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  ground: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  decoration: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "} {",
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const ground: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  const walls: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  const decoration: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    ground.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "      const isBorder =",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        x === 0 || x === MAP_WIDTH - 1 || y === 0 || y === MAP_HEIGHT - 1;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom1 =",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "        x &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 15; // Library wing",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom2 =",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "        x &gt;= 30 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 10 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 25; // Reading room",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom3 = x &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 45; // Courtyard",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inCorridor =",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "        (x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 25 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 30) ||",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "        (y &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (isBorder) {",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inRoom1 || inRoom2) {",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inRoom3) {",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.GRASS;",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inCorridor) {",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = x % 3 === 0 ? TILE.GRASS : TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.03 ? TILE.RUBBLE : TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "      decoration[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.02) {",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.5 ? TILE.VINE : TILE.DEBRIS;",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Wall boundaries for rooms",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 5; x &lt;= 15; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[5][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[15][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 5; y &lt;= 15; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[y][5] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[y][15] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls[10][5] = TILE.EMPTY; // Door",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 30; x &lt;= 45; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[10][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.36687755584716797
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/scenes/BootScene.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 8
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 148,

          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 9,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 9,
                "column": 16
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 9,
                "column": 16
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 10,
                "column": 3
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class BootScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "  preload() {",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Generate procedural tileset (post-apocalyptic palette)",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 4 columns x 3 rows = 12 tiles @ 32x32 each",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "    const cols = 4;",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "    const rows = 3;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    const width = cols * TILE_SIZE;",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    const height = rows * TILE_SIZE;",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    const graphics = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Brightness rules: floors (0-3) stay above min luminance; walls (4-5) stay below max.",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    const palette = [",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "      0x8b7355, // 0 floor (stone/tan)",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "      0x4a7c4e, // 1 grass (overgrown green)",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "      0x7a5530, // 2 dirt",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "      0xa89888, // 3 stone floor (lighter interior)",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "      0x353535, // 4 wall (dark — bounded/solid)",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "      0x454545, // 5 rubble base (distinct, textured)",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "      0x2d4a2d, // 6 vine (dark green overgrowth)",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      0x4a4a4a, // 7 debris",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "      0x3a5a6b, // 8 flooded base (blue-gray, textured)",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    ];",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; palette.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tx = (i % cols) * TILE_SIZE;",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ty = Math.floor(i / cols) * TILE_SIZE;",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      graphics.fillStyle(palette[i], 1);",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "      graphics.fillRect(tx, ty, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Rubble (5): irregular chunks for texture — distinct from plain floors",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (i === 5) {",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillStyle(0x3a3a3a, 0.8);",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillRect(tx + 2, ty + 4, 10, 8);",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillStyle(0x505050, 0.7);",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillRect(tx + 14, ty + 12, 12, 10);",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillStyle(0x2a2a2a, 0.9);",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillRect(tx + 6, ty + 20, 14, 6);",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Flooded (8): wavy water-like texture — clearly distinguishable",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (i === 8) {",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillStyle(0x4a6a7b, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillRect(tx + 0, ty + 8, TILE_SIZE, 6);",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillRect(tx + 0, ty + 20, TILE_SIZE, 6);",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillStyle(0x2a4a5b, 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        graphics.fillRect(tx + 0, ty + 14, TILE_SIZE, 4);",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    graphics.generateTexture('tileset', width, height);",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "    graphics.destroy();",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Placeholder: book fragment — book-like shape, high contrast (accessibility)",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3644433915615082
    },

          {

            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "const config: Phaser.Types.Core.GameConfig = {",

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "  width: 1024,",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "  height: 768,",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "  scene: [BootScene, ExploreScene, ShipScene],",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  physics: {",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "    default: 'arcade',",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    arcade: {",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "      debug: false,",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    },",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "const StartGame = (parent: string) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  return new Game({ ...config, parent });",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "};",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "export default StartGame;",
            "lineNumber": 24
          }
        ]

      "codeBlock": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "create() {",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "() =&gt; ('player-moved', onPlayerMoved));",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onInteractiveConsumed = ({ type, id }: { type: string; id?: string }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "      const destroy = () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (type === 'book' &amp;&amp; id) {",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "          const container = this.bookContainers.get(id);",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (container) {",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "            container.destroy();",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "            this.bookContainers.delete(id);",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "          this.interactionSystem.unregister(id);",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "          useGameStore.getState().actions.setBooksRemainingOnThisMap(this.bookContainers.size);",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "        } else if (type === 'journal' &amp;&amp; id) {",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "          const container = this.journalContainers.get(id);",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (container) {",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "            container.destroy();",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "            this.journalContainers.delete(id);",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "          this.interactionSystem.unregister(id);",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "        } else if (type === 'battery' &amp;&amp; id) {",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "          const container = this.batteryContainers.get(id);",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (container) {",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "            container.destroy();",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "            this.batteryContainers.delete(id);",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "          this.interactionSystem.unregister(id);",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "      };",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.time.delayedCall(50, destroy);",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('interactive-consumed', onInteractiveConsumed);",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.events.once('shutdown', () =&gt; EventBridge.off('interactive-consumed', onInteractiveConsumed));",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.movePlayer({ x: spawnX, y: spawnY });",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.checkRoomEntry(spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.clearExploredTiles();",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setExplorableTileCount(this.mapData.reachableTiles.size);",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.updateFOV(spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "    // World bounds",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.physics.world.setBounds(",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "      0,",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "      0,",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "      MAP_WIDTH * TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "      MAP_HEIGHT * TILE_SIZE",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Camera",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera = this.cameras.main;",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera.setBounds(0, 0, MAP_WIDTH * TILE_SIZE, MAP_HEIGHT * TILE_SIZE);",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera.setZoom(1);",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera.startFollow(this.player.getSprite(), true, 0.08, 0.08);",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 206
          },

            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 207

          },

            "lineNumber": 535
          },

          {
            "text": "interface IProps",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "export const PhaserGame = forwardRef&lt;IRefPhaserGame, IProps&gt;(function PhaserGame({ currentActiveScene }, ref)",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "    const game = useRef&lt;Phaser.Game | null&gt;(null!);",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    useLayoutEffect(() =&gt;",

          },

            "lineNumber": 21
          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 27

            "lineNumber": 28
          },

          },

          },

          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "            if (game.current)",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "            {",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "                game.current.destroy(true);",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "                if (game.current !== null)",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "                {",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49
          },

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Interaction system",

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Interaction prompt rendered via React (InteractionPrompt.tsx) to avoid Phaser Text/WebGL bugs",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Reset battery at start of expedition",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setFlashlight(100);",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.moveCount = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Sync store on movement",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onPlayerMoved = ({ x, y }: { x: number; y: number }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.moveCount++;",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (this.moveCount % 5 === 0) {",

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "      }",

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.events.once('shutdown', () =&gt; EventBridge.off('player-moved', onPlayerMoved));",

          },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "for (let i = 0; i &lt; count &amp;&amp; i &lt; roomsToUse.length &amp;&amp; i &lt; fragments.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Subtle pulse so books are easy to spot",
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "text": "        targets: container,",
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "text": "        scale: 1.08,",
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "text": "        duration: 900,",
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "text": "        yoyo: true,",
            "lineNumber": 351
          },
          {
            "text": "        repeat: -1,",
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "text": "        ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',",
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.interactionSystem.register({",
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "text": "        id: frag.id,",
            "lineNumber": 356
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: 'book',",
            "lineNumber": 357
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridX: tile.x,",
            "lineNumber": 358
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridY: tile.y,",
            "lineNumber": 359
          },
          {
            "text": "        label,",
            "lineNumber": 360
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setBooksOnThisMap(count);",
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "text": "    // NPCs: 1–2 per map, in rooms other than spawn, never in same room as a book",
            "lineNumber": 365
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomsWithBooks = new Set(roomsToUse.map((r) =&gt; r.room));",
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcRoomData = roomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 367
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dx = Math.abs(room.centerX - spawnX);",
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dy = Math.abs(room.centerY - spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 369
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (dx &lt;= 1 &amp;&amp; dy &lt;= 1) return false; // exclude spawn room",
            "lineNumber": 370
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (roomsWithBooks.has(room)) return false; // exclude rooms with books",
            "lineNumber": 371
          },
          {
            "text": "      return true;",
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 373
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcCount = Math.min(1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2), npcRoomData.length);",
            "lineNumber": 374
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcsToPlace = [...NPC_CATALOG].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5).slice(0, npcCount);",
            "lineNumber": 375
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; npcCount &amp;&amp; i &lt; npcRoomData.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { room, tiles } = npcRoomData[i];",
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "text": "      const npc = npcsToPlace[i];",
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; ",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "text": "               !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y) &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "               !isCorridorTile(t.x, t.y) // Don't block corridors/doorways",
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (available.length === 0 || !npc) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.npcBlockedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 535
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 642,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/scenes/BootScene.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 148,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "import { Scene } from 'phaser';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "import { TILE_SIZE } from '@/config/gameConfig';",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": " * BootScene: Preload minimal assets and create procedural tileset.",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": " * Tileset spritesheet is generated at runtime for Phase 1.3.",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": " * TODO: Replace with asset-based loading (itch.io/Kenney tileset) when available.",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "export default class BootScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  constructor() {",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "    super({ key: 'BootScene' });",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "  preload() {",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Generate procedural tileset (post-apocalyptic palette)",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 4 columns x 3 rows = 12 tiles @ 32x32 each",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "    const cols = 4;",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/scenes/ExploreScene.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "endPosition": {

        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 16
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 16
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 27,
                "column": 3
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 203,

            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "    const count = Math.min(",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "      2 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3),",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "      bookRoomData.length,",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "      4",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "    const fragments = getRandomFragmentsForMap(count);",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "    const distFromSpawn = (r: GeneratedRoom) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "      Math.abs(r.centerX - spawnX) + Math.abs(r.centerY - spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "    const farRooms = bookRoomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; distFromSpawn(room) &gt;= 8);",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "    const nearRooms = bookRoomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; distFromSpawn(room) &lt; 8);",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledFar = [...farRooms].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledNear = [...nearRooms].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomsToUse: { room: GeneratedRoom; tiles: { x: number; y: number }[] }[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (shuffledFar.length &gt; 0) roomsToUse.push(shuffledFar[0]);",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "    const rest = [...shuffledFar.slice(1), ...shuffledNear].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const r of rest) {",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (roomsToUse.length &gt;= count) break;",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomsToUse.push(r);",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomNamesWithBooks = roomsToUse.map((r) =&gt; r.room.name);",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setRoomsWithBooksOnMap(roomNamesWithBooks);",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "    const usedTiles = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "    usedTiles.add(&#96;${spawnX},${spawnY}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "    const isAdjacentToUsed = (x: number, y: number) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.has(&#96;${x - 1},${y}&#96;) || usedTiles.has(&#96;${x + 1},${y}&#96;) ||",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.has(&#96;${x},${y - 1}&#96;) || usedTiles.has(&#96;${x},${y + 1}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Check if a tile is a corridor/chokepoint (blocking it would prevent passage)",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 535
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 642,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.28412750363349915
    },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default function GameContainer() {",
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "const handleInfoKey = ",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "const discoveryPercent = ",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": " Math.round((exploredTiles.length / explorableTileCount) * 100)",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "        : 0;",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Build natural spoken summary with pauses (periods create TTS pauses)",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "      const parts: string[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Flashlight status",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (flashlightBattery &gt; 75) {",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Good condition.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (flashlightBattery &gt; 50) {",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (flashlightBattery &gt; 25) {",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Getting low.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;Flashlight at ${flashlightBattery} percent. Critically low.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Spare batteries (no \"press B\" hint here - that's said on pickup)",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (spareBatteries === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('No spare batteries.');",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (spareBatteries === 1) {",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('1 spare battery.');",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;${spareBatteries} spare batteries.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Fragments remaining",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (booksRemainingOnThisMap === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('No book fragments left in this area.');",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (booksRemainingOnThisMap === 1) {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push('1 book fragment remaining.');",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "        parts.push(&#96;${booksRemainingOnThisMap} book fragments remaining.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Total collection progress",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "      parts.push(&#96;Collection progress: ${fragmentCount} of ${TOTAL_FRAGMENTS} total.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Discovery progress",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "      parts.push(&#96;Area explored: ${discoveryPercent} percent.&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Join with \" ... \" for extra pauses between sections",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "      useGameStore.getState().actions.openDialogue([{ text: parts.join(' ... ') }]);",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleInfoKey);",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "    return () =&gt; window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleInfoKey);",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "  }, []);",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "  useEffect(() =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onInteractionTriggered = ({",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "      type,",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "      id,",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "    }: {",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "      type: string;",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "      id?: string;",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    })",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": ";",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {

          {

          },
          {

          {

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "│   └── gameConfig.ts       # Constants: tile size, map dims, movement speed, etc.",

          },

            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create the &#96;EventBridge.ts&#96; singleton using a typed EventEmitter pattern",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create &#96;gameConfig.ts&#96; with initial constants:",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "  - TILE_SIZE: 32",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "  - MAP_WIDTH: 50 (tiles)",

          },
          {
            "text": "  - MAP_HEIGHT: 50 (tiles)",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "  - PLAYER_MOVE_DURATION: 150 (ms for tween)",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.2 — Zustand Store (Convex-Shaped)",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Define the store with this shape (mirrors future Convex tables):",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },

## Phase 2.1 Procedural Map Generation Requirements Check

### ✅ Requirement 1: Use ROT.Map.Digger for interior ruins (hallways, rooms)
**Status: MET**

**Evidence:**
- `MapGenerator.ts` line 6: `import { Map as ROTMap } from 'rot-js';`
- Lines 61-70: Creates `new ROTMap.Digger(MAP_WIDTH, MAP_HEIGHT, {...})` with room/corridor configuration
- Line 77: Calls `digger.create(...)` to generate the map structure

### ✅ Requirement 2: Generate a 50x50 tile map as a 2D number array
**Status: MET**

**Evidence:**
- `gameConfig.ts` lines 7-8: `MAP_WIDTH = 50` and `MAP_HEIGHT = 50`
- `MapGenerator.ts` lines 55-59: Initializes 2D arrays with dimensions `MAP_HEIGHT` × `MAP_WIDTH` (50×50)
- Lines 72-75: Creates `rawMap: number[][]` as a 2D number array with dimensions `MAP_WIDTH` × `MAP_HEIGHT` (50×50)

### ✅ Requirement 3: Transform rot.js output into Phaser tilemap-compatible data
**Status: MET**

**Evidence:**
- `MapGenerator.ts` lines 107-128: Transforms `rawMap[x][y]` values into separate `ground`, `walls`, and `decoration` layers (MapLayer type)
- `ExploreScene.ts` lines 55-103: Converts these layers to Phaser tilemaps using `this.make.tilemap({ data: ground })`, `this.make.tilemap({ data: walls })`, and `this.make.tilemap({ data: decoration })`
- Returns `GeneratedMap` with `ground`, `walls`, and `decoration` layers ready for Phaser

### ✅ Requirement 4: Add a decoration pass (vegetation/vines, rubble/debris)
**Status: MET**

**Evidence:**
- `MapGenerator.ts` lines 130-151: Decoration pass that adds:
  - `TILE.DEBRIS` (rubble/debris) adjacent to walls (line 142, 25% chance)
  - `TILE.VINE` (vegetation/vines) in stone floor rooms (line 148, 3% chance)
- Lines 172-186: Also adds `TILE.FLOODED` decoration tiles (water/flood effects)
- Decoration layer is separate from ground/walls and returned in `GeneratedMap`

### ✅ Requirement 5: Implement room identification with names ("library wing", "reading room", etc.)
**Status: MET**

**Evidence:**
- `MapGenerator.ts` lines 11-21: Defines `ROOM_NAMES` constant array with names including "library wing", "reading room", "archives", "courtyard", "stacks", "rotunda", "vestibule", "study", "scriptorium"
- Lines 83-102: Extracts rooms via `digger.getRooms()` and assigns names from shuffled `ROOM_NAMES` array to create `taggedRooms: GeneratedRoom[]`
- Lines 23-31: `GeneratedRoom` interface includes `name: string` property
- Line 215: Returns `rooms: taggedRooms` in the `GeneratedMap`
- Lines 278-286: Provides `getRoomAt()` helper function to query room names by position

---

**Summary:** All 5 requirements are met. The implementation uses `ROT.Map.Digger` to generate 50×50 maps, transforms the output into Phaser-compatible layers, includes decoration passes for vegetation/rubble, and assigns named rooms from a predefined list.

---
